chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 404 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 This reference is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even today, the applicant has remained unrepresented since at least 2020. Same is the case today; therefore, in view of the judgment of Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge Amjad
